name: DiagRequestSeed
description: Sends a SecurityAccess requestSeed sub-function to start the seed&key exchange.
Receives a seed via Diag_Response callback; tester must compute the key and send via DiagSendKey.
return: 0 if request was sent successfully, <0 on error

description: Request seed for level 1 security access.

note: Must be in a non-default diagnostic session (e.g. Extended 0x03) for level 1+.
